mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_enrollment(schedule_id, student_id, enroll_time, status) VALUES(#{scheduleId}, #{studentId}, SYSDATE, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_enrollment SET status = #{status} WHERE enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_enrollment WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND schedule_id = #{scheduleId}

SELECT e.enrollment_id, s.student_name, c.course_name, t.teacher_name, cs.day_of_week, cs.start_period, cs.end_period, e.enroll_time, e.status FROM t_enrollment e JOIN t_student s ON e.student_id = s.student_id JOIN t_course_schedule cs ON e.schedule_id = cs.schedule_id JOIN t_course c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN t_teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.teacher_id WHERE e.student_id = #{studentId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED'ORDER BY e.enroll_time DESC

SELECT e.enrollment_id, s.student_name, c.course_name, t.teacher_name, cs.day_of_week, cs.start_period, cs.end_period, e.enroll_time, e.status FROM t_enrollment e JOIN t_student s ON e.student_id = s.student_id JOIN t_course_schedule cs ON e.schedule_id = cs.schedule_id JOIN t_course c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id JOIN t_teacher t ON cs.teacher_id = t.teacher_id WHERE e.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' ORDER BY e.enroll_time DESC

SELECT c.course_name, cs.day_of_week, cs.start_period, cs.end_period FROM t_enrollment e JOIN t_course_schedule cs ON e.schedule_id = cs.schedule_id JOIN t_course c ON cs.course_id = c.course_id WHERE e.student_id = #{studentId} AND e.status = 'ENROLLED' AND cs.day_of_week = #{dayOfWeek} AND cs.start_period < #{endPeriod} AND cs.end_period > #{startPeriod}
